title: IP Restrictions for API Tokens

posts.author: einavpeleg (Einav Peleg)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d like to suggest adding support for IP allowlisting/restrictions on API tokens.
This feature would significantly enhance security by ensuring that API tokens can only be used from trusted IP addresses or ranges.

Such a capability is commonly available in other platforms and is especially valuable for organizations and enterprise users looking to limit exposure of sensitive operations or integrations.
